full_text:
Gu Li “A-li” 谷利 “阿利”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Li (谷利)aka“A-li” (阿利). Bodyguard, helped Sun Quan across a broken bridge at Hefei. Admired by Sun Quan. Gu Li was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
